title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run software. The platform integrates databases, storage, terminal access, GitHub, AWS, and one-click HTTPS deployment to bridge the gap between code generation and live application deployment.
